      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.lang.Class<UserDTO> UserDAOImpl.getDTOClass()
      Gets the DTO class for this DAO implementation.
      Methods in com.rays.dao.impl with parameters of type UserDTO 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void UserDAOImpl.delete​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Deletes a user and also deletes their associated profile picture to maintain data integrity.
      protected java.util.List<javax.persistence.criteria.Predicate> UserDAOImpl.getWhereClause​(UserDTO dto, javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder builder, javax.persistence.criteria.Root<UserDTO> qRoot)
      Builds WHERE clause predicates for user search criteria.
      void UserDAOImpl.populate​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates the user DTO with role name and preserves existing last login and image ID information.
      Method parameters in com.rays.dao.impl with type arguments of type UserDTO 
      Modifier and Type Method Description

      Builds WHERE clause predicates for user search criteria.

      Authenticates a user with login ID and password.
      UserDTO UserServiceInt.changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String oldPassword, java.lang.String newPassword, UserContext userContext)
      Changes the user's password after validating the old password.

      Finds a user by their login ID.

      Handles forgot password functionality.

      Registers a new user account.
